main.description: Residual data from translating a specific record through an asymmetric lens. Stores the information the get direction stripped so that put can reconstruct the original source.

lens.description: AT-URI of the lens record that produced this complement.

sourceRecord.description: AT-URI of the original source record that was translated.

targetRecord.description: AT-URI of the translated target record, if it was persisted.

sourceHash.description: Content hash of the source record at translation time, for staleness detection.

objectHash.description: Content hash of the residual blob.

blob.description: The residual data: field values, sort data, or other content the lens set aside.
